cards.title: The Four Horsemen of the Apocalypse
cards.creator: Albrecht Dürer
cards.notice: Motion, danger, and the compressed violence of Revelation appear in woodcut form.

cards.title: The Triumph of Death

cards.title: Der Krieg / World War I prints
cards.creator: Otto Dix

cards.title: Apocalypse ’42
cards.creator: Viktor Schreckengost
cards.notice: Apocalypse ’42 is a modern apocalyptic image shaped by wartime fear, human violence, and the feeling of civilization under threat.
